Cancer vs Senescence may be like coding the tradeoff between memory leaks vs recursion limits.

{{#widget:YouTube|id=c_DV_hLlVIY|start=624}}

[[Category:Biology]]
[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ericisms]]
[[sn:Cancer vs Senescence as Design Tradeoffs]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
